text: Pattern across roughly 200 GBPs I have crawled. Profiles with photos updated in the last 30 days consistently rank better in the map pack than those with stale media. Freshness shows up in places people do not look. #LocalSEO #SEO
Every AI search is killing SEO thread is written by someone selling an AI search course. The fundamentals did not get killed. They got renamed. #SEO #GEO #LocalSEO
Shipped a feature nobody asked for. Rolled it back 48 hours later. Lesson I keep relearning. Excitement to build is not the same signal as evidence of demand. #buildinpublic #SaaS

In a small test set, changing a GBP primary category moved rankings three to five positions on average. Not surprising in theory, surprising in magnitude. The settings page is doing more work than people think. #LocalSEO #SEO
Pick your niche by who can afford to be wrong. Plumbing, HVAC, legal, dental. The reason these are crowded is not that they are easy. It is that the customers actually pay. #SaaS #LocalSEO

Friday night, reading a database design book instead of writing code. Schema decisions you make in week one decide what features are easy in year one. Boring upfront, compounding forever. #buildinpublic #devtools

Mass followed 200 people in my niche thinking it would grow my account. It did not. What actually worked was 30 thoughtful replies a day for two weeks. Reach is earned in the replies, not the follow button. #buildinpublic #SaaS
The best SaaS products I have used were built by people who had the problem themselves. If you are building for a market you do not understand, you are guessing in production. #SaaS #buildinpublic
Six weeks in. The signup number is fine. The DM quality is the actual leading indicator. Five this would replace what I pay for beats fifty looks cool, will check it out. #buildinpublic #SaaS

Looked at review velocity vs map pack position across 150 businesses. Ten recent reviews consistently outperformed two hundred old ones. Freshness beats volume more than freshness beats quality. #LocalSEO #SEO

Spent real money on a cold email tool to recruit beta users. Got nothing. Posted one honest tweet about what I was building. Got twelve DMs. The internet rewards specificity, not scale. #buildinpublic #SaaS
